ideation: This sequence mimics the action of someone proudly presenting the number one.  The animation will feature a single arm extending forward, palm open, in a gesture of presenting the number one. The other arm will remain in a relaxed position. The motion will be deliberate and confident, highlighting the significance of the number one. In frame one, the right arm will be at rest. In frame two, the right arm will extend forward, palm up and slightly outward. In frame three, the arm will remain extended, but the wrist will tilt slightly upward, emphasizing the presentation.  In frame four, the arm will begin to return to its resting position, palm facing slightly inward. In frame five, the arm will be back at rest. The left arm will remain at the side, only adjusting minimally to maintain balance.

frames.beat: both arms rest at the sides, relaxed
the right arm extends forward, presenting the number one
the arm holds steady, emphasizing the number
the arm begins to retract, palm turning inward
the right arm returns to rest at the side
